title: Add neutral announce routing gradient owner between L2 and gateway app
description: Why this exists: lichen/subsys/lichen/l2 is a reusable subsystem and must not directly call app-private gateway_announce_ingest_verified(); announce processing also needs common peer/gradient ownership using immediate-neighbor metadata, not just gateway location ingestion. What needs to be done: create a neutral announce/routing subsystem API that accepts authenticated raw announce payload plus immediate-neighbor metadata, updates TOFU/peer/gradient state, and lets the gateway app consume verified app_data coordinates through its existing policy-gated network-location ingestion. Cover no-hardware native_sim tests; chain physical RF validation separately.
notes: Implementation evidence 2026-07-03: added neutral Zephyr routing announce subsystem (CONFIG_LICHEN_ROUTING) with authenticated announce parse/verify, TOFU IID/pubkey pins, sequence extension, reset-aware stale handling, immediate-neighbor metadata, multiple app-data observers, and L2 routing dispatch ingestion. Gateway announce ingestion now wraps the neutral subsystem and consumes verified app_data through existing gateway_network_location_submit_announce policy. Production gateway prj.conf enables CONFIG_LICHEN_ROUTING. Tests added/updated: lichen/tests/routing_announce builds standalone CONFIG_LICHEN_ROUTING without CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK and covers parse, signature ingest, metadata, multiple observers, stale/reset-aware observer behavior, L2 dispatch, and callback retry; meshtastic_gateway_adapter covers gateway bridge, expired downstream reset, routing dispatch, failure rollback, and stale rejection. EC2 validation on i-0875d1ad33af5db66 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr: command west twister -T lichen/tests/routing_announce -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-8ko4 --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-8ko4/lichen. Result: 3 scenarios / 6 instances selected, 2 skipped by static filter, 4/6 passed, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 176 test cases executed. Suites: net.lichen.routing_announce qemu_x86 passed 1.16s 7 cases; native_sim passed 0.02s 7 cases; net.lichen.meshtastic_gateway_adapter.native native_sim passed 0.10s 81 cases; net.lichen.meshtastic_gateway_adapter.qemu qemu_x86 passed 1.85s 81 cases. Review evidence: earlier reviews found and fixes addressed production gateway CONFIG_LICHEN_ROUTING, avoiding full link selection, active-pin expired reset, standalone routing peer cap/TINYCRYPT dependency, stale observer side effects, singleton observer clobbering, callback-under-mutex deadlock risk, Schnorr object matrix with LICHEN_LINK_SCHNORR=n, and concurrent ingest sequence regression. Final reviews by 019f2558-cedd-7a53-a631-272fbd62e3a7 and 019f2558-e40c-7521-81a6-7e1ee976c010 reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; residual risks only non-transactional observer side effects and policy choice for expired reset tolerance.
close_reason: Completed: neutral routing announce owner implemented, tested on EC2 native_sim/qemu_x86, reviewed cleanly, and pushed in commit 795b7c99.
